name: Winwheel.js
when_to_use: 需要图片扇区、丰富文字方向或预计算停点的老牌 canvas 奖轮时用它,而非手写圆弧与旋转判定——原生手写在图片裁剪、角度命中和缓动停点上失败。若只要现代无依赖决定轮盘,优先 spin-wheel。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能画静态扇区,做不到 Winwheel 的图片绘制模式、文字朝向、落点角度计算和动画后命中判定;库把这些历史边角集中在一个 canvas 类中。

data_in.note: data_in 映射到 Winwheel 原生 options;boot 注入 canvasId 并把 numSegments 缺省值校准为 segments.length。动画仍依赖旧版 GSAP TweenMax,boot 显式加载 gsap@2;这是上游结构限制。

segments.fillStyle?: CSS color string —— 默认继承 wheel.fillStyle('silver')
segments.strokeStyle?: CSS color string | null —— 默认继承 wheel.strokeStyle('black')
segments.textFillStyle?: CSS color string —— 默认继承 wheel.textFillStyle('black')
segments.size?: number(deg) —— 默认 null,由未指定 size 的扇区均分余角

schema.numSegments?: number —— catalog 默认 segments.length;上游裸默认 1
schema.outerRadius?: number(px) | null —— 默认 null,取 canvas 较短边可用半径

animation?._default: 默认不传则不自动播放;传入时 boot 调用 startAnimation()
animation?.easing?: GSAP 2 easing string —— spinToStop 默认 'Power4.easeOut'

spec.note: Winwheel 直接读取 canvas width/height 属性;boot 默认创建 420×420 canvas,不使用 CSS 百分比高或 vh(铁律 3)。要改尺寸须同时改 canvas 属性与本 spec。

boot.widget: unsupported:Winwheel 1.0.1 在构造器内硬编码 document.getElementById(canvasId),无法穿透 widget shadow root;把 canvas 放 light DOM 会违反载体隔离。

example._why: segments、numSegments、秒制 duration 与 TweenMax 依赖很容易被其他 wheel API 污染,minimal 用来钉死 Winwheel 原生形状。

uplink: local-interact 类;结束回调、中奖结果回传与可信随机由消费 AI 自己编排。真实奖品不得让前端轮盘决定中奖值。

carriers.widget: unsupported:document.getElementById 不可见 shadow 内 canvas
carriers.codex: conditional:普通 iframe document + canvas 可用;动画还需 gsap@2 TweenMax 全局

isolation.evidence: Constructor hard-codes `document.getElementById(canvasId)` (lib/Winwheel.js:98) to resolve its canvas — a canvas inside a widget shadowRoot is invisible to document.getElementById, so it cannot mount in shadow (matches catalog widget=unsupported). Source has no document.head/createElement('style') (no style injection), no document.body append (no DOM mutation), and no addEventListener/window listeners of its own (animation runs on GSAP's internal RAF ticker, not document events).

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need a mature canvas prize wheel with image segments, rich text orientation, or precomputed stopping points, instead of hand-writing arcs and rotation hit detection, because native implementations fail at image clipping, angle hits, and eased stopping. If you only need a modern dependency-free decision wheel, prefer spin-wheel.
en.why_valuable: AI can only draw static segments by default; it cannot provide Winwheel image-drawing modes, text orientation, landing-angle calculation, or post-animation hit detection. The library consolidates these historical edge cases in one canvas class.

data_in.note: data_in maps to native Winwheel options. boot injects canvasId and calibrates the numSegments default to segments.length. Animation still depends on legacy GSAP TweenMax, so boot explicitly loads gsap@2; this is an upstream structural constraint.

segments.fillStyle?: CSS color string -- Inherits wheel.fillStyle('silver') by default
segments.strokeStyle?: CSS color string | null -- Inherits wheel.strokeStyle('black') by default
segments.textFillStyle?: CSS color string -- Inherits wheel.textFillStyle('black') by default
segments.size?: number(deg) -- Default null; segments without size divide the remaining angle equally

schema.numSegments?: number -- Catalog default segments.length; bare upstream default 1
schema.outerRadius?: number(px) | null -- Default null, using the available radius of the canvas's shorter side

animation?._default: When omitted, does not autoplay; when provided, boot calls startAnimation()

spec.note: Winwheel reads canvas width/height attributes directly. boot creates a 420x420 canvas by default and does not use CSS percentage height or vh (Rule 3). To change size, update both canvas attributes and this spec.
